plot_template: Two characters who should never be together are thrown into unavoidable proximity by circumstances, each carrying wounds that make them dangerous to love, and must choose between self-preservation and something real.
world_building_notes: Atmosphere and tension are everything. Settings should feel claustrophobic, charged, and immersive. Power dynamics must be intentional and acknowledged.
emotional_core: Desire vs. self-protection, trauma and healing, choosing vulnerability
